title: Playground Diagnostics Console
concept: A tabbed support-engineer workspace that leads with runtime status, logs, database details, and environment health while keeping creation, save, management, editor, blueprint, gallery, import, and export flows one tab away.
flows: Monitor active Playground status, logs, database, storage, network, and live WordPress page context from the first viewport
Start a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, .zip import, or featured Blueprint shortcuts
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename and delete actions
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, and export actions through workspace tabs
Browse and filter the full Blueprint gallery before running a selected Blueprint
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and warning states
